applied_axiom_recommendations.subject: Alarma
applied_axiom_recommendations.reason: Las alarmas son avisos/eventos de seguridad operacional y el A-Box usa ambas familias en preguntas de errores.

applied_axiom_recommendations.subject: DiagnosticoFallo
applied_axiom_recommendations.reason: Los diagnósticos de fallo son señales/avisos de condición anómala usados junto a errores y alarmas.

applied_axiom_recommendations.subject: Esquema
applied_axiom_recommendations.reason: Un esquema es una representación documental gráfica; mejora compatibilidad con ilustradoEn/detalladoEnEsquema sin crear clases.

applied_axiom_recommendations.subject: compuestoPor
applied_axiom_recommendations.reason: Both properties already exist in the project runtime evidence only when declared; skipped unless both are present.

applied_axiom_recommendations.subject: Maquina
applied_axiom_recommendations.reason: Physical machine and document manual should not be canonicalized as the same identity.

applied_axiom_recommendations.subject: Maquina
applied_axiom_recommendations.reason: Physical machine and directive/normative artifact are identity-disjoint.

applied_axiom_recommendations.subject: Empresa
applied_axiom_recommendations.reason: Organization and directive/normative artifact are identity-disjoint.
